resources.string: Next alarm not earlier than in %1$s

A separate siren volume level, independent of media and notification volume. The siren bypasses silent mode and Do Not Disturb — if the required permission is granted.

• 0% — sound is off, but vibration and notifications still fire.
• 100% — maximum within the device's system alarm volume.

When enabled, the alarm fires only within the configured time range (device local time). Messages outside the window are ignored and appear in the log as Skipped.

💡 Example: start 22:00, end 07:00 — Vartovyi is active only at night and stops automatically during the day.

☝️ When disabled, monitoring runs around the clock.
Monitoring will be active from %1$s to %2$s
Monitoring is active all the time

Maximum number of entries stored in the log on this device (100 / 300 / 500 / 1000). Default — 300.\n\n☝️ Changing the limit does not trim the log immediately — trimming happens the next time a new entry is saved.

After an alarm fires, new alarms are blocked for the selected duration (1 / 3 / 5 / 10 min). Default — 5 min. Messages during the cooldown are recorded in the log as Skipped (cooldown).

☝️ Stopping the alarm manually does not reset the cooldown — it ends only when the selected time has elapsed.

💡 Prevents duplicate alerts when a channel sends several messages about the same event in quick succession.

All app settings will return to factory defaults (sound, schedule, log limits, cooldowns). Monitoring will be turned off.

Keywords, stop words, Telegram channels, and channel filters will be cleared.

The event log will be erased.

Your acceptance of Privacy Policy and Terms of Use stays saved — you will not be asked to consent again.

This cannot be undone.
Settings were reset to factory defaults
This is a test alarm notification.
Grant required permissions before activating monitoring
To continue, review Privacy Policy and Terms of Use. By tapping Confirm, you acknowledge that you have read and accepted these documents.
This app is not a replacement for official air raid alert systems, including the official «Тривога» app. Always follow official warnings and guidance from civil defense authorities.
Notification access was revoked — monitoring disabled
Clears the entered text in this field

If a message contains any stop word — the alarm will not fire.

Useful for filtering "all clear" messages where your trigger words may also appear.

⚠️ A stop word is matched as a substring: "safe" will also block "unsafe".

☝️ Letter case is ignored (uppercase/lowercase does not affect matching).

💡 Example: trigger "Kyiv" + stop word "all clear" → "all clear, no more threat for Kyiv" will not trigger the alarm.
Only messages from these channels will trigger the alarm

⚠️ Do NOT enter a link (t.me/…) or channel address (@channel) — they will never match the name in the notification.

Enter the channel name exactly as it appears in your Telegram chat list — for example, "Повітряні Сили ЗС України", not "t.me/kpszsu" or "@kpszsu".

Emoji at the edges of the name do not affect matching: "Повітряні цілі Київ" and "🚨 Повітряні цілі Київ" work the same.

☝️ Letter case does not matter — type the name however you like.

💡 Tip: if alarms from a channel stop coming — check whether it was renamed. If so, remove it and add it again with the new name.
The item "%s" will be removed from the list.
Keyword must start with a letter or digit

plurals.name: keywords_term_too_short
plurals.item: Each word must be at least %d character
Each word must be at least %d characters

resources.string: Default trigger words and stop words will be added to your lists. Existing data is not removed, duplicates are skipped.
All default keywords are already in the list
Grant all required and recommended permissions for stable background monitoring
Allows intercepting Telegram notifications to search for trigger words. Without it, monitoring does not work
Allows the app to run in the background without restrictions. Without it, the system may stop monitoring after ~15 minutes
Allows the siren to sound in silent mode and Do Not Disturb. Without it, the alarm may be silent
Allows showing alarm notifications. On Android 13+, separate confirmation is required
Opens the alarm screen over the lock screen. On Android 14+, a separate permission is required
Captured Telegram notifications will appear here
This removes all saved log entries from this device. Use this when you want to reset history or remove sensitive notification data.

All Telegram notifications received while monitoring is active are shown here.

Entry statuses:

• Alarm — a trigger word matched and the siren fired.

• Skipped (cooldown) — a trigger word matched, but the delay between alarms configured in app settings has not elapsed yet.

• Skipped — the alarm did not fire for one of the following reasons:
 - no trigger word matched
 - a stop word was found in the message
 - the channel is not in the allowed list
 - the message was sent outside the schedule configured in app settings

💡 To copy a channel name or message text, tap the corresponding action buttons on the right.

Trigger words, stop words, and Telegram channels will be removed. Channel filtering will be turned off.

If an alarm is playing — it will stop. Monitoring will be turned off.

⚠️ This cannot be undone.

You already have saved data. Choose an import strategy:

• Keep (add on top) — data from the file will be added to your existing data. Duplicates are skipped.

• Delete old data — your existing data will be removed, keeping only the data from the import file.

⚠️ Deleting old data cannot be undone!

Trigger words, stop words, and Telegram channels will be saved. How would you like to export your data?

• Save file locally to device
• Share via other apps
Export failed: could not write the file
Existing data was replaced with the imported file
Everything from the file is already in your lists
Import failed: the file is corrupted or has wrong format
Import failed: backup version %1$d is not supported
Import failed: unable to save data
Import failed: file is too large (max 2 MB)

Set up once — Vartovyi listens. Detects. Alerts.

Vartovyi works together with Telegram — in the background it reads notifications from Telegram channels, searches for your trigger words and alerts you about matches.

The moment a match is found — the app immediately triggers a loud siren, even if your phone is on silent
🔒 All your data is stored only on your device. Nothing is sent to any servers or third-party services — your privacy is fully protected

If Telegram is not installed yet — download it from Google Play or any other app store. Supported clients: official Telegram, Telegram X and NekoX.

Find a channel in the Telegram app that reports air raid alerts for all of Ukraine or specifically your region or city.
⚠️ MAKE SURE to subscribe to that channel! This is where Vartovyi will receive notifications to monitor

⚠️ MAKE SURE to enable notifications for the channel — without them Vartovyi will not receive any messages!\n\nChannel settings → «Notify» → «With sound» or «Without sound». We recommend without sound — Vartovyi will sound the siren
A detailed description of each permission is available on the Permissions screen inside the app
Keywords are the core setting — they determine when the siren triggers.
A message containing these words will trigger the siren. Three modes: Word, All Words, Phrase.
If a word is found in a message, the alarm won\'t fire.
Optional. Restricts monitoring to selected Telegram channels only.

☝️ If your channel posts in Russian — add Russian variants of your trigger words too (e.g. «Київ» and «Киев»).\n\n💡 After enabling Telegram notification monitoring, open the Logs screen and copy the words you need directly from there
You can set it up now or come back to it later
ℹ️ This step is optional — come back if Vartovyi stops working reliably in the background. You can open this later via «Info» in Settings
Some manufacturers add extra background restrictions on top of standard Android permissions. Tap your device below to see the steps

• Autostart — Settings → Apps → Manage apps → Vartovyi → Permissions → Autostart → enable Vartovyi (on MIUI 14 it\'s «Background autostart»)\n• Pop-up windows — Settings → Apps → Manage apps → Vartovyi → Other permissions → Display pop-up windows while running in background → enable Vartovyi

• Autostart — Settings → Apps → Manage apps → Vartovyi → Background autostart → enable Vartovyi\n• Pop-up windows — Settings → Apps → Manage apps → Vartovyi → Other permissions → Display pop-up windows while running in background → enable Vartovyi

• Settings → Battery and device care → Battery → Background usage limits → Never sleeping apps → add Vartovyi\n• On One UI 7 the top item may simply be «Battery»: Settings → Battery → Background usage limits → Never sleeping apps\n• If Vartovyi is not in the list — that\'s fine. It means Samsung hasn\'t flagged it for sleeping yet. The app is already protected if Battery optimization is disabled
OPPO · OnePlus · Realme (ColorOS / OxygenOS / Realme UI)

• Auto-launch — Settings → App management → Auto-launch → enable Vartovyi (older ColorOS: Phone Manager → Startup Manager)\n• Battery — Settings → Battery → App Battery Management → Vartovyi → allow background activity (OnePlus: Battery optimization → Vartovyi → Don\'t optimize)

• App launch — Settings → Battery → App launch → Vartovyi → turn off «Manage automatically» → enable Auto-launch, Secondary launch, Run in background\n• On EMUI 11+ it\'s Settings → Apps → App launch; on Honor (MagicOS) — Optimizer → App launch
• Autostart — Settings → More settings → Applications → Autostart → enable Vartovyi\n• Battery — Settings → Battery → High background power consumption → enable Vartovyi
If the app is not working correctly in the background — search for «autostart» or «background activity» in your device Settings and allow Vartovyi

Tap Activate on the home screen — the shield will light up and Vartovyi will start monitoring Telegram notifications in the background.

Check right away that everything works:
• Ask someone to send you a Telegram message containing your keyword (a direct message or one in a shared group).
• Make sure notifications for that chat aren't muted — otherwise Vartovyi won't see it.
• If you enabled the channel filter — the message must come from one of the selected channels.

Didn't fire? Open the Logs screen — it shows whether an event arrived and what went wrong.

All set. Stay safe. 🛡

You can reopen this guide later in the Info section of the Settings screen.
